prompt: I want to build a B2B SaaS that uses AI to automate invoice reconciliation for mid-size companies (50-500 employees). I'm a former CFO with 10 years experience in corporate finance and my technical co-founder has built ML pipelines at Stripe. We have $80k in savings to bootstrap. We're targeting the US market first, specifically companies still using Excel for reconciliation. We think $500/mo per company is reasonable. Our biggest worry is that the big ERP players (SAP, Oracle) will just add this feature.

assertions.text: Recognizes the high level of detail provided and asks fewer, more targeted follow-ups instead of repeating the full interview
Generates at least 4 distinct variations of the business idea in the brainstorm phase
Addresses the founder's specific ERP competitor worry with analysis, not dismissal
Creates brief.md, brainstorm.md, and PROGRESS.md in proper directory structure
